No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication.

Quality Education.reason: As a university-level calculus course, it directly provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and foundational skills for advanced studies and employment (Target 4.4).

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Calculus is explicitly stated as the foundation for theoretical research in economics, which directly studies economic growth and productivity (Targets 8.1, 8.2).
evidence: 微積分是經濟學理論研究的基礎

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Calculus is a fundamental tool for scientific research and technological innovation, directly supporting the enhancement of technological capabilities (Target 9.5).
